summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlasEditionsLab Stripe subscription system and book editing features. Backend APIs working correctly with proper authentication and subscription requirements. Frontend shows correct pricing plans and chapter ranges.

design_issues.issue: Tarifs link only visible on authenticated pages, not on landing page
design_issues.note: This appears to be intentional design - landing page shows minimal nav

passed_tests: Pricing page loads with 3 subscription plans ✓
Plan Auteur is marked as popular ✓
Subscription plans API returns correct data ✓
Book creation requires authentication (403 without subscription) ✓
Login and register forms present and functional ✓
Create book redirects to authentication when not logged in ✓
Navbar shows Tarifs link on authenticated pages ✓
Book title update API endpoint working ✓
